title: tanacetum ptarmiciflorum
intro: Tanacetum ptarmiciflorum, also known as White Tansy, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and rheumatism. The health benefits of White Tansy include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, reduce pain, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum ptarmiciflorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
